meaning: n.性急的人,暴躁的人,鲁莽的人,卑鄙的人
examples: It has been a bad week for Tottenham Hotspur.
Tottenham Hotspur bought Luka Modric before Euro 2008, to prevent losing him to a rival.
October 2008: Arsenal v Tottenham Hotspur, FA Premier League match, Emirates Stadium, London
Manchester United toured South Africa last year while Tottenham Hotspur were the visitors in 2007.
However, his main rival for the national jersey, Tottenham Hotspur's Neil Sullivan, is still injured.
